name: LLMNR/NBT-NS Poisoning and SMB Relay Detection
description: Detects LLMNR/NBT-NS poisoning and NTLM relay attacks by monitoring for Responder, Inveigh, ntlmrelayx, mitm6, and suspicious LLMNR/NBT-NS network activity from non-system processes.
query: (process.command_line: (*Responder* or *Inveigh* or *ntlmrelayx* or *mitm6* or *PetitPotam*)) or (event.code: "3" and destination.port: (5355 or 137) and not process.executable: (*svchost.exe or *dns.exe))
